title: ホラーは作り物って言うヤツなんなん？

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? You want me to watch a horror movie with you? I'm so in!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident
text_block_list.text: Nice! It won't be as scary if we watch in a group!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'm totally down! When opportunity texts, you
have to answer!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what was tha—oh, someone just dropped
their phone! Don't scare me like that!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Who said that crap about opportunity texting?
Some texts should be left on read!
